@if (step() !== 'success') {
Order Address Payment
@if (step() === 'address') {

Shipping & Billing Address

@if (useDefaultAddress()) {
{{ address() }}
} @else {
}
} @if (step() === 'payment') {

Payment Information

Note: For payment any demo or testing beta version payment gate will work. This is a frontend prototype.

}

Order Summary

Subtotal {{ subtotal() | number }}
Taxes {{ taxes() | number:'1.0-0' }}
Total {{ total() | number:'1.0-0' }}
} @if (step() === 'success') {

Thank you for your order

Order {{ finalOrderNumber() }}

Your payment has been processed. A confirmation email has been sent to your registered address.

Order Info

Subtotal {{ finalSubtotal() | number }}
Taxes {{ finalTaxes() | number:'1.0-0' }}
Total {{ finalTotal() | number:'1.0-0' }}
}
